raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a weight loss product from a company called " XXXX '' They claimed that a full refund would be given if you did not see results OR FOR ANY REASON, if you, the buyer, returns your empty bottles as well as any unused bottles to them. 
After just XXXX weeks I began contacting them. I had GAINED XXXX lbs, whereas, by their claims, I should have lost XXXX lbs. 
I spoke with a woman who CALLED ME initially upon my receiving the most expensive option, a bounty of XXXX bottles that I ordered totaling just under {$400.00}!!! She explained that the weight gain, " could happen '' although, this ofc, was never advertised in their videos/adverts. she suggested that I continue another few weeks- I was admant that I was not willing to go over the 60 day guarantee which they offer for money back. I waited XXXX more week- still gaining, bit losing weight. 
I am now calling this numer, texting this number RELENTLESSLY, to no avail. 

So I emailed them and again- nothing. 

The company is IMPOSSIBLE TO REACH, I've tried to return my unused product for a refund and had XXXX luck. 

Finally, I disputed the charge thru my AMEX card with which it was purchased. I assumed that went well as they immediately reunded the full amount to my card. 
Now, it's past the time the company will approve a refund and a new bill has appeared on my card for the full amount. 

I could really use some help here. 

EVERYTHING I'VE SEARCHED ON THE WEB RE XXXX REPORTS /VALIDATE THAT THIS IS A SCAM AND THERE ARE MANY, MANY VISTIMS OF THIS SCAM. SOME HAVE BEEN LUCKY ENOUGH TO BE COMPENSATED, BUT MANY, INCLUDING MYSELF HAVE NOT. 

I'm not well off, I couldn't afford to lose this money- but for the claims that they made, I was willing to forgo other necessities to lose these stubborn pounds. They are literally preying on people 's insecurities and it's disgusting. 

Please let me know if I can provide further information. 

I purchased the item on : XX/XX/2025 and it appeared on my card as " XXXX * XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX removed the charges and then just reinstated them this month stating that I lost the dispute- I'm LIVID
